---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div style="max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0rem 0;">

  <p style="color: #6b8f85; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 2.5rem;">
    <!-- A collection of selected projects spanning water resources, environmental data science, policy analysis, and remote sensing.-->
  </p>

    <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #2e7d6e; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; padding-bottom: 0.4rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #d0e6df;">Data Science</div>

  <div class="portfolio-grid">

    <div class="portfolio-card">
      <div class="card-type">Quarto Report</div>
      <div style="font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1e2d2a; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Exploring Streamflow Across the Colorado River Basin</div>
      <p>Built a complete analytical pipeline using 44 years of USGS streamflow data, including low-flow threshold monitoring, basin-wide drought visualization, and a predictive model of annual flow at the Colorado River Compact's primary accounting point.</p>
      <a class="card-link" href="https://lynette-schwanger.github.io/csu-523c/523C_Lab-1_Schwanger.html">Read Report →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="portfolio-card">
      <div class="card-type">Quarto Report</div>
      <div style="font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1e2d2a; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">The Geometry of Place: Spatial Analysis and Distance Calculations</div>
      <p>Computed distances from 28,000 US cities to national and state borders, quantified the population living within the ACLU's 100-mile border zone, and built an interactive Leaflet web map with toggleable layers and popups.</p>
      <a class="card-link" href="https://lynette-schwanger.github.io/csu-523c/523C_Lab-02_Schwanger.html">Read Report →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="portfolio-card">
      <div class="card-type">Quarto Report</div>
      <div style="font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1e2d2a; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">National Dam Inventory: Tessellations and Spatial Clustering</div>
      <p>Compared five tessellation methods to demonstrate how the Modifiable Areal Unit Problem shapes spatial analysis, mapped dam distributions by purpose across the US, and computed local spatial autocorrelation to identify regional hotspots and coldspots.</p>
      <a class="card-link" href="https://lynette-schwanger.github.io/csu-523c/523C_Lab-03_Schwanger.html">Read Report →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="portfolio-card">
      <div class="card-type">Quarto Report</div>
      <div style="font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1e2d2a; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Flood Mapping with Landsat Remote Sensing: Palo, Iowa</div>
      <p>Accessed Landsat 8 imagery via the Microsoft Planetary Computer STAC API, applied five spectral water indices and unsupervised k-means classification to map 2016 Cedar River flood extents, and compared methods through an aggregated uncertainty map.</p>
      <a class="card-link" href="https://lynette-schwanger.github.io/csu-523c/523C_Lab-04_Schwanger.html">Read Report →</a>
    </div>

  </div>

  <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #2e7d6e; margin-top: 3rem; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; padding-bottom: 0.4rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #d0e6df;">Policy Analysis</div>

  <div class="portfolio-grid">
  
    <div class="portfolio-card">
      <div class="card-type">Policy Brief</div>
     <div style="font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1e2d2a; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">In Support of Securing Fen Protections via Regulation 87</div>
      <p>Policy brief to Colorado's Water Quality Control Commission advocating for stronger fen protections to safeguard water quality, carbon storage, drought buffering, and fire resiliency amid continued development threats.</p>
      <a class="card-link" href="Schwanger_Policy-Brief_Support-Fen-Protection.pdf">Download PDF →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  </div>

  <!-- REMOTE SENSING SECTION — uncomment when ready to add projects
  <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #2e7d6e; margin-top: 3rem; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; padding-bottom: 0.4rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #d0e6df;">Remote Sensing</div>
  <div class="portfolio-grid">
    ...
  </div>
  -->

</div>
```
